race.comment: FORECASTER (5) tough on-pace gelding with his hoof on the till. Gets a better set-up here with the senior rider going on fifth-up. Set a good tempo early and wasn't far away on the line when third to THE MONA LISA over 1600m at this track. Will prove hard to catch with Rachel King aboard. THE MONA LISA (17) consistent mare who doesn't know how to run a bad race. Stalked the speed and presented at the right time with a comfortable win over this track and trip. Tricky map today, and hard to ignore in this vein of form. PERFECT JUSTICE (3) Siena Grima sticks fourth-up and doesn't have to improve much to turn the tables. MURPHILLY (7) Churchill mare in form who deserves her chance in town. Shouldered the 60kg for a slick win at Gosford. Maps well at the good odds.
